title: XGBoost, Tree by Tree
tagline: Each new tree fits the residual of the last — watch the regression curve land, click by click
summary: Live gradient-boosted regression on a 1-D toy. Each click adds a new tree that fits the residuals; the ensemble prediction sharpens. Sliders for learning rate, max depth, n_estimators. Compare the boosted ensemble vs single tree vs random forest on the same target. Plus the exact gradient/Hessian formulas XGBoost uses.
highlights: Click 'Add tree' to step through boosting rounds; watch the residuals shrink and the prediction match the truth.
Single tree vs random forest vs boosted ensemble on the same data, side-by-side.
Per-step training-loss curve; hyperparameter sliders for learning rate, depth, and number of trees.
The XGBoost gain formula and second-order Newton view of why it beats vanilla GBM.
